parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human presenter with natural movements, facial expressions, and speech. Lighting and shadows are consistent, and there are no AI artifacts like distorted fingers or uncanny features.

characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion, long blonde hair. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Light blue striped button-down shirt with a white collar.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, white brick wall, warm circular light, YouTube plaque.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long blonde hair stands indoors, facing the camera. She wears a light blue striped button-down shirt. She holds a clear glass jar of water with a metal straw in one hand and looks down at a smartphone in her other hand. The background consists of a white brick wall, a circular warm-toned light fixture, and a gold YouTube play button plaque.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter holds a glass of water and a phone, demonstrating a pronunciation app. Text captions appear on screen as she speaks. An app UI overlay shows her pronunciation score, first failing and then succeeding.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Let's see if I can pronounce this word correctly.
Character A says: Vater.
Character A says: I need to work on the first consonant sound.
Character A says: Let me try again.
Character A says: Water.
Character A says: Oh wow!
Character A says: Now my score is so much better!

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with long blonde hair stands indoors, looking directly at the camera and speaking. She wears a light blue striped button-down shirt. The background features a white brick wall, a circular warm-toned light, and a gold YouTube play button plaque.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter continues speaking to the camera. Text captions appear on screen. A smartphone mockup overlay appears on the left side of the screen, displaying various video lessons from different coaches demonstrating mouth movements.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I love that the app shows me what I'm doing wrong.
Character A says: It also gives me video lessons from coaches who show me how to move my mouth to make those difficult sounds.
Character A says: Ready to sound like a native speaker?
Character A says: Download BoldVoice now!
